seoTitle: Swanston vs Takone — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Swanston and Takone. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Swanston and Takone.
heading: Swanston vs Takone — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Swanston, Tasmania and Takone, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Swanston has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Takone (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Swanston or Takone safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Swanston has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Takone scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Swanston scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Takone scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Swanston or Takone?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Swanston has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
